GEIA STD 0007 B — GEIA_STD_0007_Types_B

Target Namespace

Element and Attribute Namespaces
  • Global element and attribute declarations belong to this schema's target namespace.
  • By default, local element declarations belong to this schema's target namespace.
  • By default, local attribute declarations have no namespace.

Declared Namespaces:

Prefix
Namespace
Default namespace

xml

<xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.geia_STD_0007.com/2006/types" elementFormDefault="qualified">
...
</xsd:schema>

Types

Simple Type: achieved_availability_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: decimal
      • pattern = ([0-9]{0,2})|([0-9]{0,2}\.[0-9]{0,6})
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="achieved_availability_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:decimal">
            <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{0,2})|([0-9]{0,2}\.[0-9]{0,6})"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: allocation_designation_description_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • pattern = (INVRECORD)|(NOTAPPLIC)|(PERCRACRW)
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • pattern = (PER[0-9]{2}ACFT)|(PER[0-9]{2}MISL)|(PER[0-9]{2}ENGN)|(PER[0-9]{2}LABS)|(PER[0-9]{2}TRGT)

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="allocation_designation_description_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:pattern value="(INVRECORD)|(NOTAPPLIC)|(PERCRACRW)"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:pattern value="(PER[0-9]{2}ACFT)|(PER[0-9]{2}MISL)|(PER[0-9]{2}ENGN)|(PER[0-9]{2}LABS)|(PER[0-9]{2}TRGT)"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: annual_operating_days_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: integer
      • pattern = [0-9]{0,3}
      • 0 <= value <= 366
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="annual_operating_days_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer">
            <xsd:minInclusive value="0"/>
            <xsd:maxInclusive value="366"/>
            <xsd:pattern value="[0-9]{0,3}"/>
<-- Value range is 0-366-->         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
<--“” accommodates null values for change file element deletions-->         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

None

Schema Component Representation

   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer">

         </xsd:restriction>

</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: annual_operating_time_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: integer
      • pattern = [0-9]{0,4}
      • 0 <= value <= 8784
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="annual_operating_time_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer">
            <xsd:minInclusive value="0"/>
            <xsd:maxInclusive value="8784"/>
            <xsd:pattern value="[0-9]{0,4}"/>
<-- Value range is 0-8784. 8784 hours in a 366 day year.-->         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
<--“” accommodates null values for change file element deletions-->         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

  • value comes from list: {'AB'|'AC'|'AD'|'AG'|'AK'|'AM'|'AN'|'AP'|'AV'|'AY'|'BB'|'BC'|'BD'|'BG'|'BK'|'BM'|'BN'|'BP'|'BV'|'BY'|'CB'|'CC'|'CD'|'CG'|'CK'|'CM'|'CN'|'CP'|'CV'|'CY'|'DB'|'DC'|'DD'|'DG'|'DK'|'DM'|'DN'|'DP'|'DV'|'DY'|'EB'|'EC'|'ED'|'EG'|'EK'|'EM'|'EN'|'EP'|'EV'|'EY'|'FB'|'FC'|'FD'|'FG'|'FK'|'FM'|'FN'|'FP'|'FV'|'FY'}

Simple Type: cost_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: integer
      • pattern = [0-9]{0,8}
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="cost_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer">
            <xsd:pattern value="[0-9]{0,8}"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:

      • Base XSD Type: decimal
      • pattern = ([0-9]{0,2})|([0-9]{0,2}\.[0-9]{0,2})
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:decimal">
            <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{0,2})|([0-9]{0,2}\.[0-9]{0,2})"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

None
Sub-types:
None

Content
  • Union of following types:

Simple Type: crest_angle_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: integer
      • 0 <= value <= 90
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="crest_angle_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer">
            <xsd:minInclusive value="0"/>
            <xsd:maxInclusive value="90"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: crew_size_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: integer
      • pattern = [0-9]{0,4}
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="crew_size_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer">
            <xsd:pattern value="[0-9]{0,4}"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: critical_item_code_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • pattern = [P|M|B]{1}[CAOFDSLPQ]{2,12}
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • pattern = [C][A]|[C][O]|[F][D]|[F][S]|[L][L]|[P][Q]|[S][Q]

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="critical_item_code_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:pattern value="[P|M|B]{1}[CAOFDSLPQ]{2,12}"/>
<--The standard specifies specific codes for positions 2-13, however there is no order for the codes, which means there could be thousands of permutations, too many to list.-->         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:pattern value="[C][A]|[C][O]|[F][D]|[F][S]|[L][L]|[P][Q]|[S][Q]"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: criticality_code_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < criticality_code_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [A-Z_0-9 `~!@#$%^&*()_+-=\[\]\\{}\|;'",./?><]{1}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="criticality_code_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:pattern value="[A-Z_0-9 `~!@#$%^&*()_+-=\[\]\\{}\|;'",./?><]{1}"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: date_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < date_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = ([0-9]{2}[0][1]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][2]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]))|([0-9]{2}[0][3]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][4]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[0][5]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][6]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[0][7]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][8]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][9]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[1][0]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[1][1]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[1][2]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="date_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{2}[0][1]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][2]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]))|([0-9]{2}[0][3]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][4]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[0][5]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][6]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[0][7]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][8]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][9]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[1][0]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[1][1]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[1][2]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))"/>
<--Format date_type is YYMMDD.   YY = 00-99. MM = 01-12. DD restricted based on MM value (01-31 depending on month).-->   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: defense_logistics_information_service_screening_requirement_code_Type

Properties:

  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: decimal
      • pattern = ([0-9]{0,1})|([0-9]{0,1}\.[0-9]{0,2})
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="discount_rate_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:decimal">
            <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{0,1})|([0-9]{0,1}\.[0-9]{0,2})"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

xsd:string < failure_mode_criticality_number_Type (by restriction)

None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = ([0-9]{0,10})|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*)|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*(e|E)(\+|-)?[0-9]+)
  • length <= 10

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="failure_mode_criticality_number_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:maxLength value="10"/>
      <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{0,10})|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*)|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*(e|E)(\+|-)?[0-9]+)"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

xsd:string < failure_mode_indicator_Type (by restriction)

None

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [F|D]{1}[A-Z0-9]{3}

Simple Type: failure_mode_ratio_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: decimal
      • pattern = ([0-1]{0,1})|([0]{0,1}\.[0-9]{0,3})|([1]{0,1}\.[0]{0,3})
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="failure_mode_ratio_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:decimal">
            <xsd:pattern value="([0-1]{0,1})|([0]{0,1}\.[0-9]{0,3})|([1]{0,1}\.[0]{0,3})"/>
<--Valid = e.g. 0,1, 0.000, 0.01, 0.999, 1.000, 1.0--><--Invalid = e.g. 1.01-->         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: helicopter_mission_temperature_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: integer
      • pattern = [0-9]{0,3}|[-][0-9]{0,3}
      • value >= -460
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="helicopter_mission_temperature_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer">
            <xsd:minInclusive value="-460"/>
            <xsd:pattern value="[0-9]{0,3}|[-][0-9]{0,3}"/>
<--[-] allows for negative value-->         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

None

      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

</xsd:simpleType>

    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation

   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer">
            <xsd:pattern value="[0-9]{0,3}"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string

      <xsd:enumeration value="A"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="B"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="C"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="D"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="E"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="F"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="G"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="H"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="I"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="J"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="K"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="L"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="M"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="N"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="O"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="P"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="Q"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="R"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="S"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="T"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="U"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: item_category_code_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < item_category_code_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • value comes from list: {'7'|'8'|'M'|'D'|'1'|'H'|'4'|'5'|'6'|'2'|'G'|'N'|'P'|'R'|'3'|'Q'|'S'|'T'|'W'|'X'|'Y'|'Z'|'9'|'V'|'E'|'F'|'J'|'K'|'L'|'U'|'AA'|'AB'|'AC'|'AD'|'AE'|'AF'}

Schema Component Representation

   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:enumeration value="7"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="8"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="M"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="D"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="1"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="H"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="4"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="5"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="6"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="2"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="G"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="N"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="P"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="R"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="3"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="Q"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="S"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="T"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="W"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="X"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="Y"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="Z"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="9"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="V"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="E"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="F"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="J"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="K"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="L"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="U"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="AA"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="AB"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="AC"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="AD"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="AE"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="AF"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: item_class_of_supply_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < item_class_of_supply_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • length <= 4

Schema Component Representation

   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:maxLength value="4"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: item_criticality_number_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < item_criticality_number_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = ([0-9]{0,10})|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*)|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*(e|E)(\+|-)?[0-9]+)
  • length <= 10

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="item_criticality_number_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:maxLength value="10"/>
      <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{0,10})|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*)|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*(e|E)(\+|-)?[0-9]+)"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="loading_factor_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:decimal">
            <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{0,1})|([0-9]{0,1}\.[0-9]{0,2})"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

      <xsd:enumeration value="B"/>

Simple Type: maintenance_interval_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < maintenance_interval_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = ([0-9]{0,10})|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*)|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*(e|E)(\+|-)?[0-9]+)
  • length <= 10

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="maintenance_interval_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:maxLength value="10"/>
      <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{0,10})|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*)|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*(e|E)(\+|-)?[0-9]+)"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: maintenance_task_distribution_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: integer
      • 0 <= value <= 99
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="maintenance_task_distribution_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer">
            <xsd:minInclusive value="0"/>
            <xsd:maxInclusive value="99"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: maximum_unit_pack_cube_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: decimal
      • pattern = ([0-9]{0,6})|([0-9]{0,4}\.[0-9]{0,3})
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="maximum_unit_pack_cube_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:decimal">
            <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{0,6})|([0-9]{0,4}\.[0-9]{0,3})"/>
<--This allows for values up to 999999. According to MIL-STD-2073E, values greater than 9999.999 should be prefixed with an X followed by whole numbers (up to six characters, e.g. X999999). However, the X is used for reports/summaries and indicates that the value following the X is a whole number, and the decimal placeholders/slots on the report should be disregarded. In other words, it changes the field format on the report from a decimal to a whole number to accommodate more digits. From a standards/schema standpoint, the data can be manipulated as needed when creating reports/summaries (an X can be generated for the report)-->         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: mean_time_between_effective_function_failures_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < mean_time_between_effective_function_failures_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = ([0-9]{0,10})|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*)|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*(e|E)(\+|-)?[0-9]+)
  • length <= 10

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="mean_time_between_effective_function_failures_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:maxLength value="10"/>
      <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{0,10})|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*)|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*(e|E)(\+|-)?[0-9]+)"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

      <xsd:enumeration value="S"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="T"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="U"/>

None

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string

   </xsd:restriction>

      <xsd:enumeration value="B"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="*"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="F"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="A"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="E"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

    • Locally defined type:

Simple Type: not_repairable_this_station_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: integer
      • 0 <= value <= 100
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="not_repairable_this_station_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer">
            <xsd:minInclusive value="0"/>
            <xsd:maxInclusive value="100"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: objective_state_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < objective_state_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • value comes from list: {'task_checked'|'jacked'|'unjacked'|'safety_device_established'|'electrical_power_established'|'electrical_power_from_engine_established'|'electrical_power_from_apu_established'|'external_electrical_power_established'|'internal_electrical_power_established'|'hydraulic_power_established'|'air_supply_established'|'fueled'|'defueled'|'water_supply_established'|'controls_status_established'|'controls_status_established'}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="objective_state_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:enumeration value="task_checked"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="jacked"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="unjacked"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="safety_device_established"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="electrical_power_established"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="electrical_power_from_engine_established"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="electrical_power_from_apu_established"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="external_electrical_power_established"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="internal_electrical_power_established"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="hydraulic_power_established"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="air_supply_established"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="fueled"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="defueled"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="water_supply_established"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="controls_status_established"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="controls_status_established"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: operating_time_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: decimal
      • pattern = ([0-9]{0,4})|([0-9]{0,4}\.[0-9]{0,2})
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:decimal">
            <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{0,4})|([0-9]{0,4}\.[0-9]{0,2})"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

   </xsd:restriction>

Content

      <xsd:enumeration value="O"/>

Simple Type: parameter_range_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < parameter_range_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = ([0-9]{0,10})|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*)|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*(e|E)(\+|-)?[0-9]+)
  • length <= 10

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="parameter_range_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:maxLength value="10"/>
      <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{0,10})|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*)|([0-9]*\.[0-9]*(e|E)(\+|-)?[0-9]+)"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

None

  • value comes from list: {'R'|'V'}

      <xsd:enumeration value="R"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="V"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

      <xsd:enumeration value="5"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="6"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="7"/>

      <xsd:enumeration value="9"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="0"/>

  • value comes from list: {'Y'|'N'|'A'}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="pilot_rework_overhaul_candidate_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:enumeration value="Y"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="N"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="A"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: price_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: decimal
      • pattern = ([0-9]{0,11})|([0-9]{0,11}\.[0-9]{0,2})
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation

      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:decimal">
            <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{0,11})|([0-9]{0,11}\.[0-9]{0,2})"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">

         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: recommended_military_rank_rate_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < recommended_military_rank_rate_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • value comes from list: {'C00'|'E01'|'E02'|'E03'|'E04'|'E05'|'E06'|'E07'|'E08'|'E09'|'W01'|'W02'|'W03'|'W04'|'W05'|'O01'|'O02'|'O03'|'O04'|'O05'|'O06'|'O07'|'O08'|'O09'|'O10'|'O11'}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="recommended_military_rank_rate_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:enumeration value="C00"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="E01"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="E02"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="E03"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="E04"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="E05"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="E06"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="E07"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="E08"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="E09"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="W01"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="W02"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="W03"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="W04"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="W05"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="O01"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="O02"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="O03"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="O04"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="O05"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="O06"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="O07"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="O08"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="O09"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="O10"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="O11"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: reference_designation_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < reference_designation_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [A-Z_0-9 `~!@#$%^&*()_+-=\[\]\\{}\|;'",./?><]{0,64}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="reference_designation_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:pattern value="[A-Z_0-9 `~!@#$%^&*()_+-=\[\]\\{}\|;'",./?><]{0,64}"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

xsd:string < reference_designation_code_Type (by restriction)

None

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • value comes from list: {'A'|'U'|'F'|'C'|'Z'|'H'|'T'|'R'|'S'}

      <xsd:enumeration value="U"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="F"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="C"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="Z"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="H"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="T"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="R"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="S"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

None

         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: replacement_task_distribution_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: integer
      • 0 <= value <= 100
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="replacement_task_distribution_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer">
            <xsd:minInclusive value="0"/>
            <xsd:maxInclusive value="100"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: revision_Type

Super-types:
xsd:string < revision_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [A-Z| ]{0,2}

<xsd:simpleType name="revision_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:pattern value="[A-Z| ]{0,2}"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: revision_date_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < revision_date_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = ([0-9]{2}[0][1]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][2]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]))|([0-9]{2}[0][3]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][4]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[0][5]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][6]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[0][7]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][8]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][9]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[1][0]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[1][1]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[1][2]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="revision_date_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{2}[0][1]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][2]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]))|([0-9]{2}[0][3]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][4]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[0][5]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][6]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[0][7]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][8]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[0][9]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[1][0]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))|([0-9]{2}[1][1]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0]))|([0-9]{2}[1][2]([0-2]{1}[1-9]{1}|[1][0]|[2][0]|[3][0-1]{1}))"/>
<--Format revision_date_type is YYMMDD.   YY = 00-99. MM = 01-12. DD restricted based on MM value (01-31 depending on month).-->   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: revolving_assets_Type

xsd:string < revolving_assets_Type (by restriction)

<xsd:simpleType name="sampling_description_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"/>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: sampling_type_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < sampling_type_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • value comes from list: {'ratio'|'value'}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="sampling_type_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:enumeration value="ratio"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="value"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: sampling_value_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: decimal
      • pattern = ([0-9]{0,3})|([0]{0,1}\.[0-9]{0,2})|([1]{0,1}\.[0]{0,2})
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="sampling_value_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:decimal">
            <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{0,3})|([0]{0,1}\.[0-9]{0,2})|([1]{0,1}\.[0]{0,2})"/>
<--Valid = e.g. 0,1, 0.00, 0.01, 0.99, 1.00, 1.0--><--Invalid = e.g. 1.01-->         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: schedule_b_export_code_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < schedule_b_export_code_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [A-Z_0-9 `~!@#$%^&*()_+-=\[\]\\{}\|;'",./?><]{0,10}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="schedule_b_export_code_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:pattern value="[A-Z_0-9 `~!@#$%^&*()_+-=\[\]\\{}\|;'",./?><]{0,10}"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

None
Sub-types:
None

Content

      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

            <xsd:pattern value="[0-9]{0,10}"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: shipping_configuration_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < shipping_configuration_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • value comes from list: {'CB'|'CM'|'CN'|'CR'|'CS'|'CT'|'CU'|'CY'|'DR'|'EC'|'ED'|'KE'|'LS'|'MW'|'MX'|'PT'|'RL'|'RT'|'SB'|'SD'|'VE'|'VO'}

Schema Component Representation

   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:enumeration value="CB"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="CM"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="CN"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="CR"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="CS"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="CT"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="CU"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="CY"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="DR"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="EC"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="ED"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="KE"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="LS"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="MW"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="MX"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="PT"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="RL"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="RT"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="SB"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="SD"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="VE"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="VO"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: integer
      • pattern = [0-9]{0,3}
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="speed_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer">
            <xsd:pattern value="[0-9]{0,3}"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>

            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>

Simple Type: standard_interservice_agency_serial_control_number_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < standard_interservice_agency_serial_control_number_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [A-Z]{1}[0-9]{6}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="standard_interservice_agency_serial_control_number_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:pattern value="[A-Z]{1}[0-9]{6}"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: standby_time_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: integer
      • pattern = [0-9]{0,4}
      • 0 <= value <= 8784
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="standby_time_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer">
            <xsd:minInclusive value="0"/>
            <xsd:maxInclusive value="8784"/>
            <xsd:pattern value="[0-9]{0,4}"/>
<-- Value range is 0-8784. 8784 hours in a 366 day year.-->         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
<--“” accommodates null values for change file element deletions-->         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: subtask_description_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < subtask_description_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="subtask_description_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"/>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: subtask_number_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < subtask_number_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [0][0-9][1-9]|[0][1-9][0-9]|[1-9][0-9][0-9]

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="subtask_number_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:pattern value="[0][0-9][1-9]|[0][1-9][0-9]|[1-9][0-9][0-9]"/>
<--First group restricts to 001-099 (but excludes 010, 020, 030 etc.). Second group adds back exclusions (excludes 010, 020, 030 etc.). Third group restricts to 100-999.-->   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Super-types:
xsd:string < supercedure_type_Type (by restriction)

None

  • Base XSD Type: string
  • value comes from list: {'A'|'B'|'C'|'D'}

      <xsd:enumeration value="A"/>

      <xsd:enumeration value="C"/>
      <xsd:enumeration value="D"/>
   </xsd:restriction>

Simple Type: support_of_support_equipment_cost_factor_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: decimal
      • pattern = ([0-9]{0,1})|([0-9]{0,1}\.[0-9]{0,2})
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="support_of_support_equipment_cost_factor_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:decimal">
            <xsd:pattern value="([0-9]{0,1})|([0-9]{0,1}\.[0-9]{0,2})"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: test_requirements_document_number_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xsd:string < test_requirements_document_number_Type (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [A-Z_0-9 `~!@#$%^&*()_+-=\[\]\\{}\|;'",./?><]{0,15}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="test_requirements_document_number_Type">
   <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
      <xsd:pattern value="[A-Z_0-9 `~!@#$%^&*()_+-=\[\]\\{}\|;'",./?><]{0,15}"/>
   </xsd:restriction>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: test_score_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: integer
      • pattern = [0-9]{0,3}
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="test_score_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer">
            <xsd:pattern value="[0-9]{0,3}"/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Simple Type: utilization_ratio_Type

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
None
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Union of following types:
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: decimal
      • pattern = ([0-1]{0,1})|([0]{0,1}\.[0-9]{0,2})|([1]{0,1}\.[0]{0,2})
    • Locally defined type:
      • Base XSD Type: string
      • value comes from list: {''}

Schema Component Representation 

<xsd:simpleType name="utilization_ratio_Type">
   <xsd:union>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:decimal">
            <xsd:pattern value="([0-1]{0,1})|([0]{0,1}\.[0-9]{0,2})|([1]{0,1}\.[0]{0,2})"/>
<--Valid = e.g. 0,1, 0.00, 0.01, 0.99, 1.00, 1.0--><--Invalid = e.g. 1.01-->         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
      <xsd:simpleType>
         <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string">
            <xsd:enumeration value=""/>
         </xsd:restriction>
      </xsd:simpleType>
   </xsd:union>
</xsd:simpleType>

Glossary

Abstract (Applies to complex type definitions and element declarations). An abstract element or complex type cannot used to validate an element instance. If there is a reference to an abstract element, only element declarations that can substitute the abstract element can be used to validate the instance. For references to abstract type definitions, only derived types can be used.

All Model Group Child elements can be provided in any order in instances. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#element-all.

Choice Model Group Only one from the list of child elements and model groups can be provided in instances. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#element-choice.

Collapse Whitespace Policy Replace tab, line feed, and carriage return characters with space character (Unicode character 32). Then, collapse contiguous sequences of space characters into single space character, and remove leading and trailing space characters.

Disallowed Substitutions (Applies to element declarations). If substitution is specified, then substitution group members cannot be used in place of the given element declaration to validate element instances. If derivation methods, e.g. extension, restriction, are specified, then the given element declaration will not validate element instances that have types derived from the element declaration's type using the specified derivation methods. Normally, element instances can override their declaration's type by specifying an xsi:type attribute.

Key Constraint Like Uniqueness Constraint, but additionally requires that the specified value(s) must be provided. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cIdentity-constraint_Definitions.

Key Reference Constraint Ensures that the specified value(s) must match value(s) from a Key Constraint or Uniqueness Constraint. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cIdentity-constraint_Definitions.

Model Group Groups together element content, specifying the order in which the element content can occur and the number of times the group of element content may be repeated. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#Model_Groups.

Nillable (Applies to element declarations). If an element declaration is nillable, instances can use the xsi:nil attribute. The xsi:nil attribute is the boolean attribute, nil, from the http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance namespace. If an element instance has an xsi:nil attribute set to true, it can be left empty, even though its element declaration may have required content.

Notation A notation is used to identify the format of a piece of data. Values of elements and attributes that are of type, NOTATION, must come from the names of declared notations. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cNotation_Declarations.

Preserve Whitespace Policy Preserve whitespaces exactly as they appear in instances.

Prohibited Derivations (Applies to type definitions). Derivation methods that cannot be used to create sub-types from a given type definition.

Prohibited Substitutions (Applies to complex type definitions). Prevents sub-types that have been derived using the specified derivation methods from validating element instances in place of the given type definition.

Replace Whitespace Policy Replace tab, line feed, and carriage return characters with space character (Unicode character 32).

Sequence Model Group Child elements and model groups must be provided in the specified order in instances. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#element-sequence.

Substitution Group Elements that are members of a substitution group can be used wherever the head element of the substitution group is referenced.

Substitution Group Exclusions (Applies to element declarations). Prohibits element declarations from nominating themselves as being able to substitute a given element declaration, if they have types that are derived from the original element's type using the specified derivation methods.

Target Namespace The target namespace identifies the namespace that components in this schema belongs to. If no target namespace is provided, then the schema components do not belong to any namespace.

Uniqueness Constraint Ensures uniqueness of an element/attribute value, or a combination of values, within a specified scope. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cIdentity-constraint_Definitions.
